title: picea abies subsp. europaea
intro: Picea abies subsp. europaea, also known as European spruce, is a subspecies of the Picea abies tree native to Europe, characterized by its narrow, conical shape and dark green needles. The resin of the European spruce has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Picea abies subsp. europaea include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the European spruce, such as essential oils and extracts, are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation, relieve stress, and soothe respiratory problems.
